Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $46,009,673Details
International Box Office $29,888,427
Worldwide Box Office $75,898,100
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,688,873
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,316,371
Total $7,005,244
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Hard-partying brothers Mike and Dave place an online ad to find the perfect dates for their sister's Hawaiian wedding. Hoping for a wild getaway, the boys instead find themselves outsmarted and out-partied by the uncontrollable duo.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,628,170 (36.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$33,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,982 opening theaters/3,008 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,615,683

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 8th, 2016 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: July 7th, 2016 (Wide), released as Maikas ir Deivas ieško pamergių (Lithuania)
July 8th, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
July 8th, 2016 (Wide), released as Mike & Dave Need Wedding Dates (New Zealand)
July 8th, 2016 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
July 8th, 2016 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
Video Release: September 13th, 2016 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content, language throughout, drug use and some graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2423 (Cert #50290), 5/4/2016)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Geographical setting: Hawaii
Plot point: Delayed Adulthood, Dysfunctional Family, Wedding Day Disasters
Social setting: Wedding Day
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Chernin Entertainment, TSG Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
